title: La Tale
description:
La Tale is a beautiful 2D side-scrolling fantasy MMORPG with fast-paced combat and endless customization. Choose from 10 distinct Classes and over 50 potential Job Specialties to create your own unique Hero of legend. Visit cozy towns and sprawling cityscapes, conquer exploration fields and instance dungeons packed with quests and secrets, and challenge colossal area bosses solo or with a party across 3 massive continents.

Customize your Hero exactly how you want with upgradeable weapons, gear, and powerful magical enchantments, plus rare outfits, helpful pets, and unlockable titles and emotes that let you express yourself your way. Push deeper into a rich endgame with systems like Ascension, Awakening, and Zodiacs, and keep growing through regular content updates — including all-new story episodes, dungeons, and events.

Embark on an epic quest across the world alongside other legendary heroes to battle the forces of the Demon World and search for the renowned champion Iris Livier. The world of La Tale is yours to discover — how will your tale be told?

Key Features• Choose from 10 distinct Classes and over 50 potential Job Specialties

• Unlock extensive Skill Trees and Weapon Masteries

• Challenge colossal bosses either solo or with a party

• Explore 3 sprawling continents full of cities, fields, dungeons, and secret areas

• Customize your Hero's appearance with near-endless options

• Collect and raise Pets with unique, helpful skills

• Dive into a deep endgame with Ascension, Awakening, Zodiacs, and more

• Enjoy regular content updates with new episodes, dungeons, and seasonal events

• Join a Guild and raise its rank for special bonuses

• Test your skills against other players in fast-paced PvP duels

• Craft, upgrade, and enchant weapons, gear, and accessories

• Open a personal Shop and engage with the player-driven economy
description_short: Enter the magical world of La Tale, the beautiful 2D side-scrolling fantasy MMORPG. Choose from 10 distinct Classes, over 50 potential Job Specialties, and hundreds of unique weapons, pets and gear to create your own Hero of legend. Tell your tale today!
